\begin{table*}[!t]

\caption{Volume-comparison on Exp~3 synthetic benchmarks. Each cell reports the mean volume ratio over 5 seeds, where ratio $= \mathrm{vol}(R_{\mathrm{predicted}}) / \mathrm{vol}(R_{\mathrm{true}})$. Smaller is tighter; $1.00$ is exact. The reach-set ground truth comes from either a closed-form determinant (synth\_$N$d, identity-activation 1-Lipschitz nets) or a cached $N{=}10^7$-sample MC estimate (the bananas). Sample-budget configs are small/medium/large = $m{=}1{\rm k}/8{\rm k}/16{\rm k}$. \textit{Star (approx)} is the n2v sound star-set over-approximation baseline; it has no $m$ axis.}
\label{tab:exp3_volume}
